releaseNotes:
v0.23.4 - Windows Start menu installer:

- The Windows ZIP now includes 'Install RxRescue.cmd' next to rx_rescue.exe. Double-click it once after extracting and RxRescue appears in your Start menu and shows up in Start menu search. Pass /Desktop to also create a desktop shortcut. The script is safe to re-run if you ever move the install folder.

Includes everything from v0.23.3 (phone AppBar follow-up + print feedback), v0.23.2 (AppBar overflow fix), v0.23.1 (multi-device sync refresh fix), v0.23.0 (camera barcode scanning, opt-in), and v0.22.2 (sell-readiness licensing + support polish).
